sentences.translation: Majka je skuhala ukusnu hranu za večeru.
sentences.translationEn: The mother cooked a delicious meal for dinner.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتِ الْأُسْرَةُ حَوْلَ الطَّاوِلَةِ وَأَكَلَتْ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Porodica je sjela oko stola i jela zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: The family sat around the table and ate together.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَبُ: هَذَا الطَّعَامُ شَهِيٌّ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: Ova hrana je veoma ukusna.
sentences.translationEn: The father said: This food is very tasty.

sentences.translation: Djeca su zahvalila majci za večeru.
sentences.translationEn: The children thanked their mother for dinner.
